# lastKeyView()

**Instance Method**

Returns the last view in the keyboard loop of the view.

## Declaration

```swift
func lastKeyView() -> NSView!
```

## Discussion

The default return value of this method is `nil`. When the authorization plug-in calls this method, your subclass should return the last view in the keyboard loop of your custom [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/AppKit/NSView] object.

## Setting Up the Keyboard Loop

- **firstKeyView()**: Returns the first view in the keyboard loop of the view.
- **firstResponder()**: Returns the view that should get focus for keyboard events.
